## QuarkLink™ – Fleet & Certificate Management
#### Control certificates, monitor firmware integrity, and update fleets with confidence
QuarkLink™ gives you the tools to manage cryptographic trust, certificate lifecycles, and secure update operations across thousands of devices; with visibility and control from a single platform.
[Try for free](https://signup.quarklink.io/) [Book a demo](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/quarklink-v2/) [Contact sales](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/quarklink-v2/)
## QuarkLink™ brings clarity and control to operational security
  * **IT & Cloud Operations Teams**  
Rotate certificates, revoke access, and push updates to devices anywhere. 
  * **Security Architects**  
Enforce cryptographic policy and respond to threats without touching the device.
  * **Compliance & QA Leads**  
Monitor firmware integrity, manage ownership transfers, and satisfy audit requirements.
  * **Embedded Developers**  
Support post-deployment operations with no added firmware complexity.


![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-semiconductors.svg)
##### Centralised Certificate Control
Manage keys and certificates across your fleet with automation and auditability
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-hardware-software.svg)
##### OTA Orchestration at Scale
Monitor update status, roll back failed pushes, and segment devices by group
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-private-key-lifecycle.svg)
##### Revocation and Renewal
Expire or rotate device credentials without downtime or manual reconfiguration
##### Trust Continuity
Maintain strong identity and encryption policies throughout the device lifecycle
##### Threat Response Ready
Revoke or isolate compromised devices instantly without reflashing firmware
##### Compliance Simplified
Enable [certificate-based device logs and evidence for CRA or ISO audits](https://crypto-posture.com/resources/pqc-evidence-pack/?utm_source=cryptoquantique&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=partner_backlinks&utm_content=fleet_certificate_evidence)
### Certificate Renewal & Rotation
Automate certificate replacement before expiry, using built-in policies or event triggers.
![](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-managing.svg)
### Key Revocation & Replacement
Revoke certificates and regenerate credentials if a device is lost, retired, or re-owned.
![](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-end-to-end-security.svg)
### Fleet-wide OTA Monitoring
Track update success, failure, and status across device groups. QuarkLink can isolate or retry devices as needed.
![](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-quarklink.svg)
### Firmware Integrity Monitoring
Detect deviations from expected firmware states. Initiate re-onboarding or disconnect compromised devices.
![](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-total-security.svg)
### Ownership Transfer Support
Transfer device credentials securely when devices are resold or deployed in a new environment.
![](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-private-key-lifecycle.svg)
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-semiconductors.svg)
##### X.509 Certificate Lifecycle
Supports full certificate issuance, renewal, and revocation workflows
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-randomness.svg)
##### Integrity Checks
Firmware fingerprints and attestation policies per device
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-private-key-lifecycle.svg)
##### Group OTA Logic
Apply update logic by model, firmware version, or deployment status
![IoT devices](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/icon-global.svg)
##### Secure Device Unlinking
Automatically revoke cloud access and credentials if compromise is detected
##### Built-in PKI Management
QuarkLink™ includes or connects to your certificate authority
##### Time-Based Renewal
Certs can be automatically rotated before expiration
##### Alerting & Logging
Notifications and log exports available for events and audits
##### Support for Re-Onboarding
Devices can be reprovisioned and securely reconnected after reset
## Accelerate compliance with the Cyber Resilience Act (CRA)
The **EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA)** introduces mandatory security requirements for all connected products sold in Europe. QuarkLink™ has been independently evaluated by leading cybersecurity consultancy cetome, with findings confirming that it significantly supports CRA compliance.
Highlights from the independent assessment:
  * Secure-by-default configuration: ⭐ Excellent
  * Secure firmware updates (OTA): ⭐ Excellent
  * Data integrity: ⭐ Excellent
  * Secure-by-design support: ✅ Good
  * Access control: ✅ Good
  * Data confidentiality: ✅ Good


QuarkLink provides secure boot, certificate management, and OTA update features which are key to building **secure-by-design** products ready for CE Marking and CRA compliance.
[Download QuarkLink CRA Assessment](https://www.cryptoquantique.com/)
### Take control of your device fleet’s security today
QuarkLink™ gives you visibility and control across the entire operational lifecycle – from certificate rotation and update validation to revoking compromised devices and proving compliance. 
QuarkLink Ignite™ is a completely free version of our SaaS product that allows you to experience the full power of QuarkLink™
